content.problemStatement:
The Petrozavodsk camp takes place in about one month. Jafar wants to participate in the camp, but guess what? His coach is Yalalovichik.

Yalalovichik is a legendary coach, famous in the history of competitive programming. However, he is only willing to send to the camp students who solve really hard problems on Timus. The deadline that Yalalovichik set before has passed and he refuses to send Jafar to the camp.

Jafar decided to make Yalalovichik happy in hopes of changing his decision, so he invented a new sequence of numbers and named them Yalalovichik numbers. Jafar is writing a research paper about their properties and wants to publish it in the Science Eagle yearly journal.

A Yalalovichik number is created in the following way:


Consider an integer NNN in decimal notation; let's call it the base of the Yalalovichik number YNY_NYNŌĆŗ. NNN may not contain the digit 000.
Treat NNN as a decimal string. Compute all left shifts of this string N0,N1,ŌĆ”,NŌłŻNŌłŻŌłÆ1N_0, N_1, \ldots, N_{|N|-1}N0ŌĆŗ,N1ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,NŌłŻNŌłŻŌłÆ1ŌĆŗ (ŌłŻNŌłŻ|N|ŌłŻNŌłŻ denotes the number of digits of NNN); specifically, NkN_kNkŌĆŗ denotes the string formed by moving the first kkk digits of NNN to the end in the same order.
Concatenate the strings N0,N1,ŌĆ”,NŌłŻNŌłŻŌłÆ1N_0, N_1, \ldots, N_{|N|-1}N0ŌĆŗ,N1ŌĆŗ,ŌĆ”,NŌłŻNŌłŻŌłÆ1ŌĆŗ. The resulting string is the decimal notation of YNY_NYNŌĆŗ.
For example, if N=123N = 123N=123, the left shifts are 123,231,312123, 231, 312123,231,312 and thus YN=123231312Y_N = 123231312YNŌĆŗ=123231312.

You are given the base NNN. Calculate the value of YNY_NYNŌĆŗ modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
constraints: NNN does not contain the digit 000
the sum of ŌłŻNŌłŻ|N|ŌłŻNŌłŻ over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains a single decimal integer NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ŌĆö the value of the Yalalovichik number YNY_NYNŌĆŗ modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
